channel.title: Crm on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Crm on Aamu.app blog

item.title: From form submission to follow-up: workflows with Aamu.app
item.description: How to connect Aamu Forms, Databases, Automations, Webhooks, Tasks, Emails, and CRM into practical end-to-end workflows.

item.title: How to use Aamu.app as a small-team CRM
item.description: How to use the Aamu.app CRM template to track companies, contacts, deals, related work, activity, and API-driven database automations.
